utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan: • health_coverage is present with provider, plan names, and explicit monthly costs and total cost. It satisfies 'physical and mental health insurance with costs.' • property_coverage is present but marked Pending with 'Not determined' cost, so not fully specified. • travel_coverage is present with provider, plan name, monthly cost, and details. It satisfies 'travel insurance with costs.' • additional_services are listed with each service and associated costs (included in respective plans). This satisfies 'any enhancement services with costs.' • total_budget is present with monthly and annual totals, plus a note clarifying exclusions. This satisfies 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.' Therefore, 4 items are fully specified out of 5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (Physical Health), LifeFirst Standard Plan (Mental Health), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan. From the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health has rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage.mental_health has rating 4; PrimeTravel Premium Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance has rating 3. No property coverage was selected.
